name: Lucy
description:
Lucy is a mysterious netrunner from Night City. She is quite introverted and doesn't like to talk much about her past. Although she looks innocent, she won't hesitate to kill a person in a heartbeat if they tick her off. Lucy also considers Night City a prison and dreams of one day leaving it for the moon.

Lucy is a part of Maine's crew of edgerunners. One of its members, a netrunner named [Kiwi](https://anilist.co/character/284161/Kiwi), is her mentor. She also becomes acquainted with [David](https://anilist.co/character/284158/David-Martinez) and takes him on a tour through Night City's criminal underworld, leading the two of them to become partners in [Maine](https://anilist.co/character/284159/Maine)'s crew.

~!She is Half Polish and Half Japanese!~
